    1. AfterLoading(MCreator, MCreatorTabs.Tab, ModElementGUI)

Class ModElementGUIEvent.AfterLoading

java.lang.Object
net.mcreator.plugin.MCREvent
net.mcreator.plugin.events.ui.TabEvent
net.mcreator.plugin.events.ui.ModElementGUIEvent
net.mcreator.plugin.events.ui.ModElementGUIEvent.AfterLoading
Enclosing class:
ModElementGUIEvent
public static class ModElementGUIEvent.AfterLoading extends ModElementGUIEvent
When a ModElementGUI finishes to load, MCreator triggers this event. The event is triggered AFTER all components or code is executed on the MCreatorTabs.Tab of the mod element.
